creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Created attachment 189424
Remove the pre-configure part with its bogus check for Kerberos

Marcus added the check in 2007 -- maybe, Gnome was broken then and the check made some sense. It is not needed today -- I do not use Kerberos and build my world without it.

This triggers the bogus error message, which is best removed.
